case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. TIMOTHY S BOSTWICK ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $309.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100038336) AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTWICK, TIMOTHY S
DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT(S); NOTICE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 100038336) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSTWICK, TIMOTHY S $2,745.00 PRINCIPAL, $309.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,054.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100038336)
STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT (TRANSACTION ID # 100038336) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033076), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED APR-02-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTWICK, TIMOTHY S
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100038336) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
